All right, in this video, I'm going to show you all of the resources that you need in order to make your first sale with Prestige Labs. The first step is to go to affiliate.PrestigeLabs.com and log in. If you do not have an affiliate account yet, you can simply go to join our team and apply to be an affiliate. Once you're an affiliate, simply enter your username and password and you're going to log in. It's going to immediately bring you to the order page, but we're going to skip this for right now and we're going to head to the training section on this tab. Once you're here, you're going to go to the downloadable resources and this is the first step. Once you're in the downloadable resources, the first thing that we want to do is print off, download and print off the Prestige Labs supplements order form. The reason for that is this is the order form that your clients are going to use during their nutrition orientation. This allows them to circle which supplements that they prefer, purchase the bundles, pec, commissions, and payouts. The reason we're going to head here is because this has more in-depth information and training on things like how to complete a sale. Could be a one-off sale, subscribe and save, ordering upfront packages, what to do with the order forms, coupon codes, and bundles. It also houses information and training on customer service issues, commissions earned versus real-time earnings, as well as how to cancel a Prestige Labs subscription. Please understand that you can only cancel a Prestige Labs subscription. Any other types of orders you cannot cancel, just a Prestige Labs subscription. If you ever have any questions or need any help from Prestige Labs, go to the intercom button in the bottom right-hand corner, the gray button, and they will be happy to help you between the hours of 9 a.m. and 5 p.m. Central Standard Time, Monday through Friday.
